verification_note: PDF-first audit from Santhanam Vol 1 pp.178-183. All 20 predictive verses verified, 0 gaps.

claims.claim: General introduction to 10th house effects (no predictive content)
10th lord strong in exaltation or own Rasi/Navamsa -> paternal happiness, fame, good deeds
10th lord devoid of strength -> obstructions in work
Rahu strongly in kendra/trikona -> performs Jyotishtoma sacrifice, extremely religious
10th lord with benefic or in benefic's Rasi -> always gain through royal patronage and business
Contrary: 10th lord with malefic or in malefic's Rasi -> loser in calling, will not serve king
Malefics in both 10th and 11th -> bad deeds, defile own men
10th lord in 8th with Rahu -> great fool, bad deeds, hate others
Saturn + Mars + 10th lord in 7th -> fond of carnal pleasures and filling belly
10th lord exalted in kendra + Jupiter as 9th lord in 10th -> honour, wealth, valour, robes, ornaments
Rahu + Sun + Saturn + Mars in 11th -> cessation of duties, no happy calling
Jupiter in Pisces + Venus + strong ascendant lord + Moon exalted -> Gnana Yoga: learned and wealthy
10th lord in 11th + 11th lord in ascendant + Venus in 10th -> endowed with precious stones
10th lord exalted in angle/trine + Jupiter aspect -> endowed with worthy deeds
10th lord in ascendant + ascendant lord + Moon in angle/trine -> interested in good deeds
Saturn in 10th + debilitated planet + Navamsa ascendant with malefic -> bereft of virtuous acts
10th lord in 8th + 8th lord in 10th with malefic -> indulge in bad acts
10th lord in fall + malefics in 10th from both ascendant and 10th -> career obstructions completely blocked
Moon in 10th + 10th lord in trine + ascendant lord in angle -> endowed with fame
11th lord in 10th + 10th lord strong + Jupiter aspect -> fame through professional achievement
10th lord in 9th + ascendant lord in 10th + Moon in 5th -> fame through dharma-karma connection
